headline: Correction: Stocks’ median out­per­form­ance of bonds
summary: Based on a series of Amer­ican fin­an­cial asset returns dat­ing back to 1871, stocks’ median out­per­form­ance of bonds over a 10-year hold­ing period has been 3.7 per­cent­age points a year, rising to 4.6 per­cent­age points per annum over 50-year hold­ing peri­ods, not 2.3 and 4 per­cent­age points, respect­ively
